title: Enhanced Mason Trades
description: This project adds Tuff, Calcite and a few other vanilla blocks to the Mason trade table.
body:
Adds Tuff, Calcite, Bricks, Mud Bricks and Plain Terracotta into the trade table for the Mason profession.

## Features

### Blocks added to Trades
![Packed Mud Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15641c4b56f8c32fd6f720744670e19e0adf6095.png)
![Bricks Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/551cbec4206d01d23956ef7f7cee83182556bce4.png)
![Mud Bricks Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb6cf7c2fb39b71af5baf71dd48de8194e26e786.png)
![Tuff Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f9d7d05b8bce2192caa811f1c1b40867c878d35_0.webp)
![Terracotta Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/981a1a0ecf5ff4dbc85020277fc9806bc8dba608.png)
![Calcite Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d77e0ad71abec000efd3f80214f14dec773c4704_0.webp)


### Trades

- Packed Mud is added to level 1 (Novice)

![Bricks Trade of 1 Emerald for 4 Bricks Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e53392ffd3ea5464b3a8dd6a71ce6d79ed83eae0.png)
- Bricks Block is added to level 2 (Apprentice)

![Mud Bricks Trade of 1 Emerald for 4 Mud Bricks Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60f031ae002b0c35ce10314f0a05f3088f007c34.png)
- Mud Bricks Block is added to level 2 (Apprentice)
  
![Tuff Trade of 1 Emerald for 4 Tuff Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39a18220485ed901efbd77f23f11d40206488907.png)

![Terracotta Trade of 1 Emerald for 4 Tuff Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef54749abb26df2ab79568e1441983a1adfa6d83.png)
- Tuff is added to level 3 (Journeyman)
- Terracotta is added to level 3 (Journeyman)

![Calcite Trade of 1 Emerald for 4 Tuff Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64c34837778f77cf175c145616df81a58d35229b.png)
- Calcite is added to level 5 (Master)

As these levels already contain at least 2 options, the available trades will be selected randomly, so you may not get each of these each time.   

## Misc

You are welcome to add this mod to any modpack you'd like.
